title: pinus strobus f. umbraculifera
intro: Pinus strobus f. umbraculifera, also known as the eastern white pine, is a unique variant of the eastern white pine tree that has a naturally occurring umbrella-like shape, making it a sought-after species in horticulture. The essential oil extracted from its needles has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pinus strobus f. umbraculifera include its ability to reduce stress, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system, thanks to its high levels of pinene and limonene. In herbal preparations, the needles of Pinus strobus f. umbraculifera can be used to make tea, tinctures, or infused oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
